title: QualityIncident
description: A food quality or safety incident report in the Trustwell FoodLogiQ system, capturing issues related to suppliers, products, or production processes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the quality incident.

title.description: Short title describing the quality incident.

description.description: Detailed description of the quality issue.

status.description: Current resolution status of the incident.

supplierId.description: Identifier of the supplier associated with this incident.

rootCause.description: Identified root cause of the incident.

correctiveAction.description: Corrective action taken or planned to address the incident.

assignedTo.description: User or team responsible for resolving the incident.

dueDate.description: Target date for resolving the incident.

resolvedAt.description: Timestamp when the incident was resolved.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the incident was reported.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the incident record was last updated.
